prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次约 8686→7640→10739→11138，整体呈后移趋势，近 2 年累计后移约 3500 名；2025 年基准约 11138 名；该校在吉林省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 59 人，2024–2025 年增至 68 人；2026 年计划 70 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 2 人（+2.9%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响不大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第 84 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 75–84 区间，学校层次认可度较高；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录；抖音热度数据中未单独收录，整体关注度平稳，未见明显报考异常信号。
5. 【优势学科】电气工程 A、动力工程及工程热物理 A-，均为能源电力领域核心学科，与该校行业特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度持续升温（2024 年高热推荐），能源动力类专业亦为推荐方向；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 8.0 万人，较 2025 年（8.04 万）基本持平，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（竞争略加剧）、王牌电气类专业热度升温吸引更多考生，在 2025 年基准 11138 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 11365 名，区间 10865–11865 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 10865–11865 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（电气类）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<10865 名）可重点冲击电气工程及其自动化等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>11865 名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 8686→7640→10739→11138, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3500 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is about 11138; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for Physics Category was 59 students in both 2021 and 2022, and increased to 68 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 70 students, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.9%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, indicating high recognition of the university's level; no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation and public opinion documents; not separately included in Douyin heat data, overall attention is stable, with no obvious abnormal signals for applications.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, both core disciplines in the energy and power field, highly aligned with the university's industry characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Electrical Engineering and Automation major continues to heat up (highly recommended in 2024), and the Energy and Power major is also a recommended direction; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 80,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (80,400), with a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), and the rising popularity of the flagship Electrical major attracting more examinees, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward from the 2025 baseline of 11138; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11365, with a range of 10865–11865.

- Energy Storage Science and Engineering
- Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Automation

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 10865–11865, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical category) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10865), focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>11865), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including original Liberal Arts) was approximately 2164→1869→2030→2202, with significant fluctuations and no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 2202; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for History Category was 9 students in both 2021 and 2022, reduced to 7 students in 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan is only 5 students, a reduction of 2 students (-28.6%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction in enrollment, with fewer spots intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with high level recognition, also attractive to liberal arts candidates; no significant negative or positive events recorded in the university's reputation and public opinion documents; overall attention is stable; the university is primarily engineering-oriented, with no A- disciplines in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law majors have relatively high social popularity (recommended), while majors like Public Administration and Social Work have average popularity; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in this province is approximately 30,800, basically unchanged from 2025 (31,100).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2202, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (fewer spots intensifying competition), and the relatively high popularity of Law majors, the ranking is expected to move forward (harder to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1805, with a range of 1354–2256.
